commands.review_summary:
The PR changes bundled plugin and channel runtime path resolution, package-state probe ordering, bundled public-surface hardlink handling, focused regression tests, and the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main resolves bundled generated entries and package-state probes without the proposed dist-runtime and built-probe ordering, matching the linked startup/probe failure modes; I did not run a live gateway repro in this read-only review.
